docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1900 BRYANT STREET INVESTORS II LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BRIXEL, SIMONE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-16-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-14-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-02-2009
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-16-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1900 BRYANT STREET INVESTORS II LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEC-16-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-25-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-16-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-25-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
